hero.text: Dr Najat Amharar takes a whole-person approach to health — uncovering the root causes of your symptoms and crafting a deeply personalised path back to vitality.

about_snippet.heading: A physician who listens — deeply
about_snippet.lead: Drawing upon her extensive foundation as a French and UK board-certified Consultant General Surgeon, Dr. Najat Amharar integrates a unique, high-precision surgical perspective into her Functional Medicine practice.
about_snippet.body: Her approach bridges the gap between traditional acute-care interventions and a proactive, systems-biology model. Having specialized in digestive diseases and hepatobiliary surgery, she possesses a deep anatomical and physiological understanding of the gut-organ axis, which she now leverages to identify and treat the biological root causes of chronic illness. By combining her rigorous medical training with personalized lifestyle evaluations, genetic insights, and targeted nutritional therapy, Dr. Amharar empowers her patients to move beyond symptom management toward true, sustainable healing.

testimonials.quote: After years of being told my results were 'normal', Dr Najat finally found what was wrong. Six months later I feel like a completely different person.
testimonials.author: Sarah M., 38

testimonials.quote: Dr Najat's approach is unlike any other doctor I've seen. She takes the time to really understand your whole life. My energy and mood have completely transformed.
testimonials.author: James T., 45

testimonials.quote: I came to Dr Najat struggling with chronic gut issues. Her personalised protocol changed everything. I now know how to eat and live for my body.
testimonials.author: Priya R., 31
